eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: McCreary, KY; at 10:40 AM ON APR 23, 2026 Effective until 11:40 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: McCreary Co is issuing a Golden Alert for a missing person.  Be on the lookout, particularly in the Wiborg area and those areas north of Wiborg Loop for Tami West, 63 years old, white female, blond hair, last seen wearing a green shirt. If seen call McCreary Co officials at 606-376-9117 for more info go to https://tinyurl.com/McCrearyGold If you see this person please contact McCreary Co officials at 606-376-9117
